nodes.name: connector-release
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds zecurity-connector Rust binary for x86_64 and aarch64 Linux via cross-compilation and publishes a GitHub Release on connector-v* tags.

nodes.name: shield-release
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds zecurity-shield Rust binary for x86_64 and aarch64 Linux via cross-compilation and publishes a GitHub Release on shield-v* tags.

nodes.name: .note.md
nodes.summary: Developer scratchpad with cleanup TODOs: delete SPIFFERoleAgent placeholder, fix identity.go naming, remove test code before deploy.

nodes.name: admin-codegen
nodes.summary: GraphQL Code Generator config for the Admin UI; consumes controller GraphQL schema files and generates TypeScript client types and hooks.

nodes.name: admin-components
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui config specifying default style, Tailwind CSS slate base, CSS variables, lucide icons, and path aliases.

nodes.name: admin-package
nodes.summary: npm manifest for Admin UI with Apollo Client 4.x, React 19, react-router-dom 7, Zustand 5, Tailwind CSS 4, and Vite 8.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point for the Admin UI Vite application.

nodes.name: admin-README
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Admin UI React application describing setup and development workflow.

nodes.name: apollo-client
nodes.summary: Singleton ApolloClient with link chain: errorLink → authLink → httpLink (/graphql) and InMemoryCache with cache-and-network policy.

nodes.name: apollo-auth-link
nodes.summary: ApolloLink that attaches Bearer token from Zustand auth store to every request and adds X-Public-Operation header for public operations.

nodes.name: apollo-error-link
nodes.summary: Apollo ErrorLink that intercepts UNAUTHORIZED errors, calls POST /auth/refresh, updates Zustand store, and retries the original operation.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Root React Router v7 app with three route groups: public, signup wizard, and admin-only routes protected by role-based AdminLayout.

nodes.name: AuthLayout
nodes.summary: Reusable auth UI primitives including AuthShell, AuthCard, BrandBlock, ModeTabs, Field, WizardHeader, and AccountTypeCard.

nodes.name: CreateResourceModal
nodes.summary: Slide-in panel to create a resource with remote network, name, host IP, protocol, and port range fields calling CreateResource mutation.

nodes.name: DiscoveredServicesPanel
nodes.summary: Shield service discovery panel that polls GetDiscoveredServices every 30s with filter toolbar, bulk checkboxes, and bulk/single promote to managed resource.

nodes.name: EditResourceModal
nodes.summary: Slide-in panel to edit an existing resource's name, description, protocol, port range, and remote network.

nodes.name: InstallCommandModal
nodes.summary: Dialog for registering a Connector or Shield with platform selector and token generation via GenerateConnectorToken or GenerateShieldToken mutation.

nodes.name: AppShell
nodes.summary: Root CSS grid layout for admin pages composing Sidebar, Header, and main Outlet.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: Admin top header with dynamic title from pathname, search, notifications, and user dropdown with sign-out that clears Apollo store.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.summary: Admin sidebar navigation with main links, collapsible Team section, and admin-only links for Access Log, Devices, and Install Client.

nodes.name: PromoteServiceModal
nodes.summary: Confirmation modal to promote a discovered shield service to a managed resource via PromoteDiscoveredService mutation.

nodes.name: ScanModal
nodes.summary: Two-panel modal for connector-side TCP network scans: left panel configures targets and ports, right panel polls and displays results.

nodes.name: alert
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui Alert primitive with default and destructive variants via class-variance-authority.

nodes.name: avatar
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui Avatar primitive wrapping @radix-ui/react-avatar with Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback exports.
